recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.

recommendations.title: The Vast of Night
recommendations.overview: At the dawn of the space-race, two radio-obsessed teens discover a strange frequency over the airwaves in what becomes the most important night of their lives and in the history of their small town.

recommendations.title: The Naked Island
recommendations.overview: A family of four are the sole inhabitants of a small island, where they struggle each day to irrigate their crops.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
recommendations.overview: A story about a mentally ill man wrongfully imprisoned for murder and his relationship with his 6 year old daughter.

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.

recommendations.title: The Jester
recommendations.overview: A malevolent being known as The Jester terrorizes the inhabitants of a small town on Halloween night, including two estranged sisters who must come together to find a way to defeat this evil entity.

recommendations.title: The Uninvited Guest
recommendations.overview: Mysterious events lead an increasingly paranoid architect to believe a stranger is lurking in his large house.

recommendations.title: My Annoying Brother
recommendations.overview: A jailed swindler leaps at the chance to earn parole in return for taking care of his estranged brother, an athlete who recently lost his sight.

recommendations.title: Gabriel
recommendations.overview: Gabriel tells the story of an archangel who fights to bring light back to purgatory - a place where darkness rules - and save the souls of the city's inhabitants.
